string.text: The Arbiter Archangel is a brutally efficient, one-handed minigun chambered in 9x19mm, designed for those who demand overwhelming firepower without compromise. Featuring a high-speed, six-barrel rotary system with an advanced recoil-dampening gyro stabilizer, it allows for unprecedented control despite its blistering rate of fire. An optional wrist brace ensures it remains both tactical and devastating in close-quarters combat. Cloaked in matte black, the Archangel isn’t just a weapon—it’s a divine judgment rendered in lead.
Magazine for the Arbiter Archangel minigun, holds 100 rounds of 9x19mm ammunition. God help the heretics.\n\n
